what: Estimate the causal effect using JointMR — JointMR_analysis
title: Estimate the causal effect using JointMR — JointMR_analysis
text: function integrates repeated MR information obtained exposure-outcome GWAS database pairings.

title: Estimate the causal effect using JointMR — JointMR_analysis
code: JointMR_analysis(   exposure_filter_list,   outcome_filter_list,   original_outcome_list,   N_list,   ancestry = "EUR",   bootstrap_time = 500,   relaxed_nome_bootstrap_time = NULL,   original_exposure_list = NULL,   ldsc_cache = NULL,   run_relaxed_nome = TRUE,   ldsc_scope = c("all", "yy") )

title: Estimate the causal effect using JointMR — JointMR_analysis
text: exposure_filter_list list filtered exposure GWAS data frames. outcome_filter_list list filtered outcome GWAS data frames. original_outcome_list list original outcome GWAS data frames. N_list list containing sample sizes LDSC estimation. ancestry Character, e.g., "EUR". bootstrap_time Integer, number bootstrap iterations. relaxed_nome_bootstrap_time Integer, number relaxed NOME bootstraps. original_exposure_list Optional list original exposure GWAS data. ldsc_cache Optional cached LDSC correlation matrices. run_relaxed_nome Logical, whether run relaxed-NOME extension. ldsc_scope Character, scope LDSC correlation estimation ("" "yy").
